refinement_sections.content: I need to evaluate an investment proposal for expanding production capacity at a manufacturing company. This involves buying new machinery and renovating a facility.
The proposal has a cost estimate for the machinery but not for the renovation costs or working capital changes. I need to find out these costs.
I need to assume a discount rate for the NPV calculation, but I don't know how to choose it. I might need to look up common rates used in similar projects.
I will calculate the Net Present Value (NPV) and Internal Rate of Return (IRR) for the investment. I need to understand how to do these calculations.
I should consider both the financial metrics (NPV and IRR) and any strategic factors, but I need to think about what those strategic factors might be.
I need to prepare a report and present it to senior management, but I'm not sure how to structure the report or what to emphasize.
